channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Tether’s crackdown hits $4.2B in illicit funds, amplified by 340 law-enforcement partners. OSCE-backed proof of blockchain tracing in action. 💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/tether-freezes-4-2b-illicit-funds-osce-recognition #crypto #lawenforcement #blockchain

item.title: 🔥 AAVE teeters near key support as bearish momentum looms—a test of $101 could precede any bounce. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260327-price-prediction-aave-testing-109-resistance-before-potential-drop #AAVE #CryptoNews #DeFi
